purpose: Defines the `!status [dashboardId]` command for displaying a quick swarm summary in the terminal. Reads initialization.json + all progress files, merges them per the standard merge pattern (for each agent in init, look up progress; missing = pending), computes status counts + overall_status (via deriveOverallStatus()) + elapsed time (earliest started_at to latest completed_at or now). Renders Swarm header + Agents table + Wave Summary table + history hint. Read-only.
gotchas: Uses the same merge pattern as !export and !inspect — for each agent in initialization.json, look up its progress file; if no file, status='pending'
Elapsed time computation: earliest started_at to NOW if any in-progress, else to latest completed_at
deriveOverallStatus() is the canonical function (defined elsewhere) for swarm-level status — do not reimplement
Argument disambiguation: dashboard ID vs anything else — accepts 6-char hex, `ide`, and legacy dashboardN
patterns: 6-step procedure: parse → read init → read progress → merge+derive stats → display → history hint
Two output tables: Agents (id/title/wave/status/agent/summary) and Wave Summary (id/name/status/progress)
Status emojis: completed=✅, in_progress=🔵, failed=🔴, pending=⚪
conventions: Compact command doc — single-section Steps with embedded markdown render template
Status emojis enumerated in a bulleted list
Trailing history note pointing to !history command
